title: AWX Execution Environment Pull Image Errors
dataSources: AWX job and dispatcher logs referencing execution environments
app: Kubernetes events optional join (`kube:events`) for ImagePullBackOff
spl:
index=automation sourcetype="awx:job_events" OR sourcetype="awx:server"
| search "execution_environment" OR "container image" OR "ImagePull"
| search "error" OR "BackOff" OR "not found"
| stats count by execution_environment, host
| sort -count
description: Bad EE images block all templates using that environment.
value: Isolates registry auth and image tag problems for automation platform teams.
implementation: Track EE version tags; correlate with Quay/Artifactory audit logs if ingested.
visualization: Table (EE × error count), Pie chart (top registries).

references.title: AWX logging integration (job events, activity stream)

knownFalsePositives: Image pulls from new registries during vendor migrations, mirror setup, or pilot tooling evaluation.
grandmaExplanation: We watch this part of your delivery chain for risks and reliability so issues show up before they hit customers.
